moments.title: World Cup Round of 32 in full swing
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues today with Round of 32 matches as the knockout stages intensify in the US, Mexico, and Canada.

angles.name: Match Day Excitement
angles.copy: It's World Cup knockout football day! The Round of 32 is on, who are you backing to make it through? Catch the action on ITV1 tonight. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK TV Coverage
angles.copy: Don't miss the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 action tonight on ITV1. The stakes are higher than ever!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 kicks off
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 begin tomorrow, Monday 29th June, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 starts tomorrow. Who's your pick for the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles titles? #Wimbledon

angles.name: British Summer Tradition
angles.copy: It's almost time for the iconic grass courts to light up! Wimbledon officially gets underway on Monday, June 29th.

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup at Lord's
moments.blurb: Lord's Cricket Ground hosts a double-header today in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026, featuring South Africa vs Qualifier and Australia vs India.

angles.name: Cricket Action
angles.copy: Big day for women's cricket! Lord's hosts a T20 World Cup double-header today with South Africa, Australia and India all in action.

angles.name: Global Spotlight
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is lighting up Lord's today with two crucial matches. Don't miss the excitement!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park continues with Ateez, Maroon 5, Mumford & Sons
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park 2026 is live, with K-Pop sensations Ateez performing today, Maroon 5 on July 3rd, and Mumford & Sons on July 4th.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: Hyde Park is buzzing! Ateez are live today, with Maroon 5 and Mumford & Sons coming up this week at BST Hyde Park. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Maroon 5 & Mumford & Sons
angles.copy: This week at BST Hyde Park: Maroon 5 on July 3rd and Mumford & Sons on July 4th! Huge weekend of music ahead in London.

moments.title: Michael Bublé at Blenheim Palace Festival
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival culminates with Michael Bublé performing on Saturday, July 4th, as part of a star-studded line-up this week.

angles.name: Bublé Live
angles.copy: The smooth sounds of Michael Bublé will fill Blenheim Palace on July 4th! Grab your tickets for a truly special evening.

angles.name: Festival Grand Finale
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace Festival wraps up with Michael Bublé on Saturday! A fantastic week of music in a stunning setting.

moments.title: State Fayre festival wraps up today
moments.blurb: The inaugural State Fayre, billed as the UK's biggest music and BBQ festival in Chelmsford, concludes today with headliners like Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette.

angles.name: Last Chance for Fayre
angles.copy: It's the final day of State Fayre in Chelmsford! If you're near Hylands Park, catch the last of the music and BBQ vibes.

angles.name: Rock & Americana
angles.copy: Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette headlined the new State Fayre festival which concludes today. What a lineup for a debut event!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, best known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday tomorrow, June 29th.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 48th birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track? #NicoleScherzinger

angles.name: From Pop to TV
angles.copy: Celebrating Nicole Scherzinger's 48th birthday tomorrow! From chart-topping hits to judging panels, she's done it all. #Birthday

moments.title: Debbie Harry's 81st birthday
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman Debbie Harry will celebrate her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Punk Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry this Wednesday! Still an absolute icon of music and style. #Blondie

angles.name: Timeless Artist
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 81st to the legendary Debbie Harry on July 1st. What's your go-to Blondie anthem? #MusicLegend

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On for Missy Elliott's 55th birthday this Wednesday! A true pioneer and legend in music. #MissyElliott

angles.name: Influential Producer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 55th birthday to the incomparable Missy Elliott on July 1st. Her impact on music is undeniable! #MusicProducer

moments.title: Post Malone's 31st birthday
moments.blurb: Chart-topping rapper and singer Post Malone will celebrate his 31st birthday on Thursday, July 4th.

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: Happy 31st birthday to Post Malone this Thursday! What's your favourite track from the genre-bending artist? #PostMalone

angles.name: Cheers to Posty
angles.copy: Celebrate Post Malone's 31st birthday on July 4th! Always bringing the vibes. #BirthdayVibes

moments.title: 'Free Nelson Mandela' finale
moments.blurb: The compelling documentary series 'Free Nelson Mandela' concludes tonight on Channel 4 at 9pm.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Don't miss the powerful series finale of 'Free Nelson Mandela' tonight at 9pm on Channel 4.

angles.name: Documentary Deep Dive
angles.copy: Tonight's the night for the final chapter of 'Free Nelson Mandela'. Tune in to Channel 4 at 9pm.

moments.title: Death in Paradise on BBC One
moments.blurb: Catch the latest episode of the popular crime drama 'Death in Paradise' tonight at 9pm on BBC One.

angles.name: Sunday Night Drama
angles.copy: Your Sunday night mystery fix is here! 'Death in Paradise' is on BBC One tonight at 9pm.

angles.name: Escape to the Caribbean
angles.copy: Solving crimes in the sunshine! Don't miss 'Death in Paradise' tonight on BBC One.

moments.title: England Men's IT20 series vs India begins
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team starts their Vitality IT20 series against India on Wednesday, July 1st, with the first match in Durham.

angles.name: White-Ball Cricket
angles.copy: Big week for England cricket! The Men's IT20 series against India kicks off this Wednesday in Durham. Get ready for some explosive action!

angles.name: India Tour
angles.copy: The highly anticipated Vitality IT20 series between England and India begins on July 1st. Who's excited?

moments.title: Northern Ireland summer holidays start
moments.blurb: School summer holidays officially begin for children in Northern Ireland on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Happy summer holidays to all the kids in Northern Ireland! Time for fun, sun, and adventures! #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Family Fun Ahead
angles.copy: From July 1st, schools out for summer in Northern Ireland! Wishing everyone a fantastic break.
